sources.title: California Official Voter Information Guide, November 5, 2024 General Election
sources.document_role: official Prop 36 title, summary, Legislative Analyst analysis, arguments, rebuttals, and measure text
sources.inclusion_reason: The California Secretary of State official voter guide is the primary neutral government source for statewide Proposition 36.
sources.attribution_note: Tier 1 state voter guide. Ballot arguments inside the guide must still be attributed to their named proponents/opponents.
sources.review_note: Approved by project owner on 2026-07-18T22:44:17Z after review packet approval.

known_gap: This packet uses the complete official guide as one master source. Chunk-level review must separate neutral analysis from attributed arguments.
